articles.title: Alleged Tether (USDT) ‘shadow banker’ set for 2022 trial
articles.description: Reggie Fowler, a former NFL team owner and the suspected “shadow banker” involved in the Tether and Bitfinex saga, will finally have his day in court as his trial is scheduled for early 2022.

articles.title: Chainlink Expands Its Services to Incorporate Decentralized Off-Chain Computation
articles.description: Chainlink has introduced a service known as decentralized off-chain computation to monitor and automate triggers to blockchain smart contracts. The Chainlink Keeper Network service was announced during Chainlink’s annual event. It will also facilitate what has been called anti-fraud and anti-risk methods on blockchains when they are exchanging data with other blockchains. Additionally, parties to...

articles.title: Ethereum Game Axie Infinity Daily Users Grow 10X Since June to Hit 1 Million
articles.description: Axie’s recent surge continues as the game sets a new user benchmark, but not everyone has the NFTs needed to play.

articles.title: Elrond Becomes First Carbon Negative Blockchain in Europe
articles.description: Elrond announced today that it is now the first blockchain company to become carbon negative in Europe.

articles.title: CFTC Commissioner Brian Quintenz Fires Back At SEC, Affirms It Has No Authority Over Crypto Assets
articles.description: Cryptocurrencies have received a lot of heat in recent times as governments have tried to bring the runaway “wildcat” industry under regulation. US regulatory bodies, courts, and Congress are all brainstorming how to favorably satisfy the public’s expectation of them concerning cryptocurrencies. While crypto regulation still has a long way to go before there is […]

articles.title: Terra’s LUNA in Overbought Territory After 180% Rally
New SEC Regulations Add Cryptocurrency Under Security-Based Swap Rules
articles.description: The cryptocurrency industry might soon be flooded with different kinds of rules to checkmate its operations. The recent developments in the sector point towards a new SEC rule that will guide the security swaps occurring in many financial assets, including crypto. This information came from the SEC Chairman during a speech he gave to the American Bar Association Derivative & Future Law...

articles.title: Elon Musk's Latest Twitter Profile Change Is Bad News for Dogecoin Community
articles.description: After a multi-week reign, Doge is no longer on Elon Musk's Twitter profile picture

articles.title: XRP Case Gets Heated As Ripple’s Garlinghouse Ponders On SEC Creating Regulatory Confusion Around Crypto
articles.description: Prominent figures in the cryptocurrency space have continued to remark on the implied intensifying crypto-hostile atmosphere that was expressed by the US SEC Chair Gary Gensler on Tuesday, during the agency’s most elaborate commentary about its view on the cryptocurrency market. In so many words, Gensler said that the SEC stands on the various sectors […]

articles.title: Tezos Successfully Completes Granada Network Upgrade
Binance’s ‘commitment to compliance’ now means this for Hong Kong’s users
articles.description: Binance, arguably the world’s biggest crypto-exchange, has been under a lot of regulatory fire in recent months. Many authorities around the world are now seeking to clamp down on the exchange, and by extension, the crypto-market. These actions have had an impact on Binance Coin’s price as well, with the altcoin noting major corrections over […]

articles.title: Inside the Polkadot network and ecosystem with Rob Habermeier
articles.description: Polkadot co-founder Rob Habermeier chats with The Block's Frank Chaparro in the latest episode of The Scoop podcast.

articles.title: Kusama Introduces First-Ever Stablecoin kUSD, Teases KAR Liquidity Programs
articles.description: Karura (KAR) community approves stablecoin release and launch of new liquidity initiatives

articles.title: Ripple expands XRP into NFTs amid escalating legal battles
articles.description: As court grants CEO request to obtain info from Binance to bolster defense in SEC lawsuit, Ripple seeks to expand use cases for XRP Ledger.

articles.title: New Bitcoin Users Activity Spikes To New All-Time Highs, What Does It Mean?
articles.description: The new Bitcoin users graph is a sight to behold. Even though Bitcoin’s price was horizontal for a while there, the network kept growing. And, with each new participant, the network expands infinitely. And, with that, the value of the network increases in the same magnitude. Such is the nature of the “network effect” phenomenon. That is what this chart by on-chain analyst Will Clemente shows:...

articles.title: Bitcoin bulls overtake the $40K barrier ahead of Friday’s $625M options expiry
articles.description: Securing a close above $40,000 will give bullish pro traders a sizeable advantage in Friday's $625 million BTC options expiry.
